intro: idk why but i just felt like writing something random.
memories: jab tu 'cement promise' karti hai... weird but funny.
tu jab 'kaddu' bolti hai... unexpected and makes me smile.
wo canva pe 'dekh ban gaya' moment... like a kid proud of a doodle.
idk why you think you talk too much... i actually enjoy it.
constellation: jab tu comfortable hoti hai... that version is my favorite.
idk why i keep checking my phone... guess i like your random chats.
final: bas itna hi, simple aur real.
